label: 第145話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 天元は夏油の肉体を操る術師の正体が羂索であること、獄門疆「裏」の存在、死滅回游の目的を説明する。獄門疆を解くためには天逆鉾か黒縄、または天使の術式が必要だと判明する。
summary_full: 天元は一行の前に姿を現し、星漿体との同化に失敗した結果、人間より呪霊に近い存在へ進化したと説明する。羂索の目的は、死滅回游で日本人を同化前の状態へ慣らし、天元を呪霊操術の対象として全人類との強制同化を実現することだった。天元は五条を封じた獄門疆の「裏」を示すが、開門には天逆鉾か黒縄、またはあらゆる術式を消滅させる天使の術式が必要だと語る。天使は東京東部の結界にいる泳者・来栖華として示される。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 天元様 has finally been revealed. They are willing to provide information on the identity of Pseudo-夏油 and on how to unseal 五条悟 . However, 天元 requires that some of the group stay behind in the Tomb as security. When the question of how the life of an immortal being can be threatened is raised, 天元 reveals the fate-altering consequences of the incident eleven years ago.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 天元 asks that any combination of 由基, 憂太, and 脹相 remain behind to serve as guards. While everyone else is surprised by 天元の appearance, 由基 asks why 天元 didn't address her in their greeting. 天元 replies this isn't the first time they've met. 由基's next question is why the 薨星宮 was closed off. Unable to see into the human heart, 天元 feared 由基 could've been in alignment with "羂索". 羂索 is the name of the body-switching entity that was once 加茂憲紀 and now inhabits the body of 夏油傑 . 悠仁 cuts in on the important conversation to ask why 天元 looks so strange. 恵 quietly thinks to himself that 悠仁 has guts for doing so. 天元 explains that despite their 術式 provides immortality not anti-aging. Eleven years ago a new Plasma Vessel failed to appear, so 天元の aging process accelerated, and their self-awareness as an individual diminished. They were forced to evolve and have become one with the world itself. A man who broke away from 呪力, shattered the chains of fate, and destroyed 天元の destiny. 恵 and 憂太 get to the point and ask about 羂索's objectives and how to unseal 五条 from 獄門疆 . 天元 will provide the information on one condition, at least two of the three people present that are ranked special grade must remain at the Tomb to serve as 天元の guards. Willing to provide more information first, 天元 explains that 羂索 wants to force the evolution of all the people of Japan. He can't do so using 天元の barrier with 無為転変 because that requires massive amounts of 呪力. Triggering an evolution of that scale using a 術式 is inefficient. The method 羂索 has chosen to force evolution on a massive scale is to merge 天元 with mankind. Since progressing into a new state, it is possible for 天元 to merge with someone who isn't the 星漿体 Vessel . A human who merges with 天元 evolves into something beyond a sorcerer that is both there and not a part of the physical realm. 天元 stabilized and can maintain self-control even after evolving thanks to barrier techniques, but the world would end if mankind reached this state. There would be no boundaries between individuals and the impurities of millions of humans would flood the world. What happened to 東京 would engulf the entire planet. 天元 cannot refuse the merger because their evolution has caused them to become more 呪霊 than human being, a perfect target for 呪霊操術 . 脹相 and 由基 volunteer to guard 天元. Due to the threat of 羂索 coming to unseal the Tomb, the corridor is rejecting everyone that approaches. 羂索 was the one who set the plan into motion that stopped the merger eleven years ago. They were involved with 宿儺 over a thousand years ago so 由基 wonders why he's just now making a move. Apparently, 天元, the 星漿体 Vessel, and the 六眼 are connected by "fate". 羂索 was defeated by two 六眼 users is in the past. After his second defeat, 羂索 killed the 星漿体 Vessel and the next 六眼 user soon after they were born. Despite his efforts, they both appeared on the day of the merger with 天元 anway. This made him switch to the method of sealing the 六眼 instead of attempting to eradicate it. However, the unexpected occurred eleven years ago when 伏黒甚爾 intervened. He was a man who escaped 呪力 and therefore was not bound by the chains of fate that affect the jujutsu world. In effect, 甚爾 destroyed the destinies of 天元, the 星漿体 Vessel, and the 六眼. Along with him came 夏油傑, a boy who could manipulate 呪霊. Once 羂索 secured 獄門疆 six years ago, all his plans fell into place. The only two 呪具 capable of opening 獄門疆. The 死滅回游 is a ritual to prepare the people of Japan for the merger. It uses the players' 呪力 and the barriers to convey everyone "to the other side". Through this custom, 天元 can be forced to merge with humankind. In order to pull off something of this level, 羂索 has restricted himself with binding vows . One vow stipulates that he is not the 死滅回游's master, meaning killing him won't even the game. The 死滅回游 can only end once all the players are dead and there are rules in place to ensure nothing can interrupt the ritual. 悠仁 and the other's best course of action are to spend one hundred points to add rules where 津美紀 and other unwilling participants can escape the game. Freeing 五条悟 would also obviously be ideal. Before 天元 reveals how to do so, they require the group to pick a combination of 憂太, 由基, and 脹相 to serve as guards. An angel from a thousand years ago capable of extinguishing cursed techniques. 由基 and 脹相 volunteer themselves to protect 天元. 脹相 knows 悠仁 will need 憂太 or 由基's help and this will also give him the chance to protect his brothers should 羂索 come for 天元. 由基 isn't finished talking to 天元 anyway and would like to stay if that's okay with 憂太. Wanting to remain with the other students, 憂太 gleefully agrees. After expressing their gratitude, 天元 takes out the "back" of 獄門疆, a separate 呪物 that will be necessary for unsealing 五条悟. It serves as the back gate for 獄門疆 and was hidden by 天元 to try and conceal the existence of the front. 羂索 found it anyway and he bears complete authority over 獄門疆 as the bearer of the front gate. Breaking open the back would require 呪具 that can cancel cursed techniques, like the 天逆鉾 or the Black Rope . However, both of those were lost in separate battles with 五条悟. 憂太 searched for more Black Rope in Africa with ミゲル to no avail. There still remains one way to open the back gate of 獄門疆. A thousand years ago there was a female sorcerer who called herself an "angel". She possessed a 術式 that can extinguish other cursed techniques. Her name is 来栖華 and she's been incarnated as a 死滅回游 player.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 九十九由基 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 乙骨憂太 脹相 禪院真希 天元 羂索 (言及のみ) 加茂憲紀 (回想) 夏油傑 (回想) 天内理子 (回想) 伏黒甚爾 (回想) ミゲル (回想) 来栖華
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 呪術高専 薨星宮 薨星宮
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 獄門疆 呪具 黒縄／天逆鉾

key_events_verified_phase8: 天元が進化後の状態を説明する
羂索の強制同化計画が明かされる
獄門疆「裏」が提示される
封印解除手段として天使の術式が示される
来栖華の所在が東京東部の結界と判明する
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
